shared_properties: Primary painted tone uses #535353 with transparent background only.
Sprite footprint stays within 92x80 px per frame.
Beak, wing, and tail landmarks keep 2 px outline weight.
differences: Two frames alternate raised and lowered wings at 10 FPS for airborne motion readability.
Low flight uses y=50 and high flight uses y=80 while the sprite art remains unchanged.
Body posture stays horizontal so duck timing stays readable against the sky field.

reference_images.label: offline_sprite_1x
reference_images.purpose: 1x pixel atlas for dinosaur, cactus, pterodactyl, digits, and ground proportions.

reference_images.label: offline_sprite_2x
reference_images.purpose: 2x atlas for silhouette spacing, obstacle spacing, and hit-readability checks.

reference_images.label: run_loop_capture
reference_images.purpose: Run cadence, jump silhouette timing, and restart screen pacing.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load one 184x80 PNG atlas during Loading state and build a 92x80 TextureAtlasLayout before score 200 unlocks the obstacle.
runtime_notes: Advance the atlas index every 0.1 seconds for a 10 FPS flap loop.
Spawn the transform anchor at x=650 with lane heights y=50 or y=80.
Cull the entity after x drops below -100.

context.usage: Spawns after score 200 and challenges duck timing or late jump timing.

shape_notes: Wingtip vertical travel spans 14 px between the two frames.
Tail tip occupies the rear 10 px of the body footprint.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet canvas is exactly 184x80 px with no gutter between frames.
Raised-wing and lowered-wing poses remain readable at 1x scale.
Collider reference area maps cleanly to an 89x77 px obstacle hitbox.
